goal: Backfill intent history for the cuz repo itself
approach: Created intent records for all 6 existing commits retroactively, capturing the reasoning behind each change so cuz eats its own dogfood. Intent IDs derived from commit SHA prefixes for traceability.

alternatives.option: Rewrite git history to add trailers to each commit
alternatives.rejected_because: Force-push rewrites are destructive and the release tag already exists
